payload.body: Implemented: cargo-trust now dispatches cargo lifecycle commands (build/run/test/check/clippy/doc/bench/install) through cargo with RUSTC_WRAPPER+RUSTDOC set to the bundled trust-rustc/trust-rustdoc shims, located via TRUST_RUSTC/TRUST_RUSTDOC override -> sibling-of-self -> PATH. Trust-native helpers (lower/index/fix/explain) still forward to the trust CLI. Verified e2e: named-arg fixture builds+runs and doc-tests pass via 'cargo trust run/test --doc' with ZERO env vars. Added 6 unit tests (prefix strip + dispatch), a CI step, and updated SPEC.md/AGENTS.md. Full workspace test suite green. Branch feat/cargo-trust-wrapper, not yet committed.
